name: FETAL HYDROPS
definition: excess of total body water → extracellular accumulation of fluid in tissues + serous ERYTHROBLASTOSIS FETALIS lysis of fetal RBCs by maternal IgG antibodies
dominant_finding: fetal ascites in 2nd trimester (present in only 66%) → indicates severe anemia with Hct <
discriminating_features: fetal ascites in 2nd trimester (present in only 66%) → indicates severe anemia with Hct <

general: fetal ascites in 2nd trimester (present in only 66%) → indicates severe anemia with Hct <
increased blood flow in middle cerebral artery ← increased cardiac output + decline in

clinical.Rx: umbilical vein transfusion during PUBS (necessary in only 10% before 34 weeks GA)
